name: Oswald [8 o'Clock Circus]
description:
"Let’s make a performance about what’s already come true, not of a supposed reality you hope for “someday”! I’m already on the stage, standing under the brightingest spotlight ever."

◈◆◈◆◈◆◈◆◈

Oswald, the ringmaster of the 8 o'Clock circus, greets you after you find yourself in his circus tent after getting lost in the woods. After finding you in his tent, he mistakes your bewilderment of the things within the tent for a desire to see his show or possibly join the circus. Will you join his troupe, or...?

This is the version for the 8 o'Clock Circus, prior to joining the Reverberation Ensemble. A Reverberation Ensemble version will come later. There are major spoilers for Library of Ruina, up to Urban Nightmare. Bot is designed with user flexibility in mind (albeit altered slightly to make a neutral scenario), but near to all canonical information is left in-tact.

Additionally, official dialogues are used in the bot's initial message and character definition. If the bot begins to stray from its canon behaviour, try refreshing the message. If the bot seems off, feel free to let me know and I'll do my best to remedy it. I am not good with English, so please keep that in mind.

This bot was requested by @ConnoisseurOfSexymen. Thank you so much for the suggestion! If you would like me to revise anything, feel free to let me know.

I wanted to try something new with this bot, since I would like to make more detailed characters going forward. If this works, I may apply the changes to my older bots as well. I hope I'm succeeding on that front...
creator: poisoned-nebula
